sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO td_config (config_id, config_key, config_value, config_type, environment, description, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by) VALUES (#[configId], #[configKey], #[configValue], #[configType], #[environment], #[description], #[createdTime], #[createdBy], #[updatedTime], #[updatedBy])
sqlMap.update: UPDATE td_config SET config_key = #[configKey], config_value = #[configValue], config_type = #[configType], environment = #[environment], description = #[description], updated_time = #[updatedTime], updated_by = #[updatedBy] WHERE config_id = #[configId]
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM td_config WHERE config_type = #[configType] AND config_key = #[configName] AND environment = #[environment]

SELECT * FROM td_config WHERE 1=1 #if($configType) AND config_type = #[configType] #end #if($environment) AND environment = #[environment] #end #if($keyword) AND (config_key LIKE concat('%', #[keyword], '%') OR description LIKE concat('%', #[keyword], '%')) #end ORDER BY updated_time DESC
SELECT * FROM td_config WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY updated_time DESC
